feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Displa G/l account balance - summary/journal entry view APP export report is text
entry.content: Display G/L account balance - summary/journal entry view APP export report is text, SAP can be changed to numbers? Can improve financial work efficiency.

entry.title: Project Control - Currency
entry.content:
Hi, 

We're in a implementation project with S4 Public cloud. Our customer is going to use Project Control - enterprise projects for theire investment projects. However we've two question that we don't really understand. 

When creating the project there is a possibility of choosing the project currency, if we don't choose the currency is seems like the system is choosing the company code currency is that correct? 

But, the strange thing we've encounted is that when entering app "Project Brief" it seems like the results in the chart is displayed in the global currency and not the project currency? Can we change this somewhere? Is this how the system should behave? 

Please see example below: 

 


Kind Regards, Sanne

entry.title: What does "_bustT" in the field component Name of a custom field refer to?
entry.content:
I defined a Custom Field to add items to the BP master.
The created item (published) has not yet been added to the screen.
　Field Type：Code List(1)
　Identifier：YY1_C_COLL_MON_240
　Business Context：Master Data: Business Partner(BP_CUSTVEND1)

On another occasion, I used the API (A_BusinessPartner) to get data, and noticed that "_ bus" was added to the end of the component name of Custom Field.
In the app, the Custom Field has a Field Component Name of "_ bus" or "_ busT".

 


I assume these are retrieved via the API, but there is also a "_ busF" result from the API.
The items in the red frame in the image below.

 

If anyone knows what the "_ bus" at the end of these refers to (especially _busT and _busF) and what purpose it is given for?
Also, is there anything to be granted other than "_ xxT" and "_ xxF"?

entry.title: Azure Synapse SAP connectors available for public cloud
entry.content:
Dear technical experts,

We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and want to connect our system to our AZURE Synapse product.  We know that there are a number of standard connectors in Synapse to do this but unsure which standard connectors will be appropriate / useable with Public Cloud.  We believe that the SAP CDC connector would best suit our purposes but what we have seen in various documentation are references to Private Cloud.  Hence our question.

Cheers

Jay

entry.title: Trial Balance Profit Center Hierarchy
entry.content:
In the Trial Balance reporting app it is not possible to display the profit center hierarchy as a dimension.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Import excel service entry sheet with account assignment error.
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to import a service entry sheet filled on the excel standar template, but it keeps returning the message Service entry sheet Account item 00001: account assignment definition not allowed, even though I already created another service entry sheet on the app using the same information, just changing the number of the PO.

It's my first time trying to import from the template. I used the help portal to fill it, but it keeps returing this message and I'm not sure which field is wrong. Does anyone know this error?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Copy Operator
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am using a copy operator within a planning area, where the source and target key figures have different planning levels. While the copy operator runs successfully, the data is not being loaded into the target key figure because the planning object is not being created. Could you please assist me in resolving this issue?

Ex:
Source Planning level: MTHPRDID ----> target Planning Level MTHPRDIDLOC
Root Attribute: PRDID                                Root Attribute: PRDID & LOCID

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Extensibility Adobe Forms
entry.content:
Dear All

We have 5 company codes and want to assign a separate company logo and footer address to standard invoice form of sales module within Public Cloud.

Is it possible to manage, all the logo and addresses dynamically within standard form using manage logo / text apps or we have to create 5 custom master forms to have hardcoded logo and addresses for each company code.

entry.title: How to prevent new pricing performed when Item category change TAN to CBXN
entry.content:
How to avoid re-determination of pricing in sales orders using TAN or CBXN as item category. 

 

 

 

 

According to note this behavious can be controlled using user exit but how to handle in public cloud?

 

DIGITS - A field change in the sales order automatically triggers pricing

 

Thanks

 

Manish


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to edit Inspection Lot Stock fields in Make Usage Decision app (SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public)
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public, when using the 'Make Usage Decision' app in the quality control process for procurement (scope item 1FM), the system does not allow me to record quantities (neither partial nor total) or modify any other field, such as storage, in the Inspection Lot Stock section. How can I resolve this issue?

No matter what Usage Decision Code I use, none of them let me edit the fields. What could it be?

entry.title: Distribution – field formula = YA divided equaly is blank after using cockpit migration.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

Distribution – field formula = YA divided equaly is blank after using cockpit migration.

The field formula = YA divided equaly is missing to fill in the file and the program leave blank, but this is a big problem because the condition was wrong and the object cash flow is not created.

Is this an cockpit migration error program?

entry.title: Deprecation of Run Actual Settlement Application - no successor app
entry.content:
Run Actual Settlement Application is deprecated but no successor app is mentioned.

Please advise of the new app that will replace Run Actual Settlement.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: #CoE#LAL Customize search criteria in Create Golden Tax Documents app
entry.content: In Create Golden Tax Documents app, can the Search Criteria  be customized?

entry.title: #CoE#LAL Change output file content in create Golden Tax Document app
entry.content: When run Create Golden Tax Documents app, which BADI can be used to change output file content?

entry.title: Inspection Specifications from Configuration Checkbox is missing
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are facing an issue in the Production client where the "Inspection Specifications from Configuration" checkbox is missing in the Quality Management view of the Material Master for a KMAT (Configurable Material). This checkbox is visible and works as expected in the TEST client, but it is not displayed in the Production client.

We kindly need assistance to resolve this issue as it is impacting our go-live which is on 3rd February. Please provide guidance on:

Why the "Inspection Specifications from Configuration" checkbox is missing in the Production client.

Any configuration or settings that might have been overlooked.

Steps to enable the checkbox in the Production client.

Thank you very much!

Test client

 Production Client

 



Best Regards,
Kaushika

entry.title: Group Reporting Balance Validation - errors in new functionality provided in 202502 upgrade
entry.content:
Hi, I have two issues with the Group Reporting New Balance validation setup testing in the starter system

  1. Consunits and Consgroup aren't available in the selection dropdown in the Assign Rule Group for Valance Validation App for each of the tasks
  2. The consolidation monitor is still looking for the old task (category 70) after the assignment of the new task S2980 into the consolidation monitor task group Z20.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Field in PO
entry.content:
Hi SAP support,

 

The customer is requesting for the field Print on date in the purchasing order screen, then from there it can be fetched in the output form,

 

Could you please let us know how to get that. 

 

Thanks,

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Output Items per Application Object Type
entry.content:
S/4HANA Public Cloud has the app Manage Output Items, unfortunately there is no option available to retrict the application types for specific business roles.

We have the requirement where different work streams would like to have a list that shows them only the output items relevant to them. Yes this can be achieved using filters, but that doesn't stop anyone viewing and actioning items for other areas of the business. E.g. someone in Purchasing accidently sending a sales invoice to a customer.

Has anyone been able to find a solution for this?

entry.title: How to create Cost Centres through template in SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hello team,

How to create Cost Centres through template in SAP public cloud.
Or how to do mass creation of cost centers 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to achieve Cost of Poor Quality / Third Party Inspection in Public Cloud( V.Urgent)
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

Need some help on the topic 

1. Cost of poor Quality

2. Third Party inspection in QM

I need help on how to achieve these requirements in SAP Public Cloud as i have to show a demo to the customer. I have tried to find solutions but unable to do so if someone knows how to achieve this IN Public Cloud , Please help me on this its very urgent.

Pardeep
